title: Reading Level Analyzer
description: Paste any text to instantly get its Flesch-Kincaid reading level and readability statistics
viralHook: Is your writing too complex? Paste it in and find out in seconds

props.title: Reading Level Analyzer
props.description: Paste or type text below to analyze its reading level using the Flesch-Kincaid formula. Works for essays, articles, assignments, and any English prose.

fields.label: Text to Analyze
fields.placeholder: Paste your text here. For best results, use at least 100 words of continuous prose. The analyzer counts words, sentences, and syllables to determine the reading grade level.

fields.label: Reading Grade Level
fields.helperText: Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level: the U.S. school grade needed to understand the text. Formula: 0.39 * (words/sentences) + 11.8 * (syllables/words) - 15.59

fields.label: Flesch Reading Ease Score
fields.helperText: 90-100: Very Easy (5th grade) | 80-89: Easy (6th grade) | 70-79: Fairly Easy (7th grade) | 60-69: Standard (8th-9th) | 50-59: Fairly Difficult (10th-12th) | 30-49: Difficult (College) | 0-29: Very Confusing (Graduate)

fields.label: Average Words per Sentence
fields.helperText: Typical range: 15-20 for general writing. Academic writing often exceeds 25.

fields.label: Average Syllables per Word
fields.helperText: Simple text averages ~1.3 syllables/word. Academic text is often 1.6+.

computedFields.syllable_count: input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).reduce((sum, word) => sum + Math.max(1, word.replace(/[^aeiouy]/gi, '').length), 0)
computedFields.avg_syllables_per_word: (input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).reduce((sum, word) => sum + Math.max(1, word.replace(/[^aeiouy]/gi, '').length), 0) / Math.max(1, input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length)).toFixed(2)
computedFields.flesch_score: (206.835 - 1.015 * (input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length / Math.max(1, input_text.split(/[.!?]+/).filter(s => s.trim().length > 0).length)) - 84.6 * (input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).reduce((sum, word) => sum + Math.max(1, word.replace(/[^aeiouy]/gi, '').length), 0) / Math.max(1, input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length))).toFixed(1)
computedFields.reading_grade_level: 'Grade ' + (0.39 * (input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length / Math.max(1, input_text.split(/[.!?]+/).filter(s => s.trim().length > 0).length)) + 11.8 * (input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).reduce((sum, word) => sum + Math.max(1, word.replace(/[^aeiouy]/gi, '').length), 0) / Math.max(1, input_text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length)) - 15.59).toFixed(1)
